title: Clippy: 2 first doc paragraphs too long — split summary from body
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Documentation & Intent
**Lint:** clippy::too_long_first_doc_paragraph

## Violation
The first doc paragraph is used by rustdoc as the summary shown in crate-level module lists. A too-long first paragraph produces unreadable summary cards.

## Locations
- src/claude_credentials.rs: 329
- src/tui/mod.rs: 554

## Mandated Refactor
Break the first paragraph at the first natural sentence boundary by inserting a blank comment line:
```rust
/// Short summary sentence.
///
/// Longer explanation continues here across multiple sentences...
```
